allow: Bash(python -c "import yaml; d=yaml.safe_load\(open\('.github/workflows/build-release.yml',encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\('YAML OK'\); [print\(' -',k, d['jobs'][k].get\('runs-on'\)\) for k in d['jobs']]")

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('.claude/settings.json',encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\('JSON OK'\); print\('Stop hook prompt 已更新，含零改动豁免:', '零改动任务' in d['hooks']['Stop'][0]['hooks'][0]['prompt']\); print\('保留的 hooks:', list\(d['hooks'].keys\(\)\)\)")

PowerShell($fp = \(Get-Command flutter\).Source; $root = Split-Path \(Split-Path $fp\); $nr = Join-Path $root "packages\\flutter\\lib\\src\\material\\navigation_rail.dart"; Write-Output "FlutterRoot: $root"; Write-Output "NavRail exists: $\(Test-Path $nr\)"; Write-Output $nr)
